generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first axis via gear transmission, controlled by Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC system with remote control capabilities. Operates within [-90°, 90°] angular range and maximum speed of 75°/s."
]

instance GearTransmission : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanical gear transmission system connecting the permanent magnet synchronous motor to the robot axis, including cycloidal gear components."
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840Dsl : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC control system providing hardware/software safety limits and emergency stop mechanisms for actuator control."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution angular position encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor, providing real-time position feedback."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary high-resolution angular position encoder positioned behind the gearbox, providing output shaft position data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current to the permanent magnet synchronous motor for performance monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque measurement sensor providing real-time torque data from the gear transmission system."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance AngularVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring angular velocity of the output shaft for dynamic performance analysis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularVelocitySensor
]

instance SensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder, InputCurrentSensor, TorqueSensor, AngularVelocitySensor
    base:desc "Aggregated time-series sensor data stream including position, current, torque, and angular velocity transmitted via MQTT protocol."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML-based kinematic model representing the mechanical structure and motion constraints of the six-axis robot system."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingFramework, SimulationIntegrationEnabler
]

instance DynamicBehaviorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model defined using SysML state machines and MontiArc Automaton for friction and dynamic simulation analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationIntegrationEnabler, MathWorksSimulink
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structural representation of the robot's mechanical components including axes, gear transmissions, and motor mounts."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingFramework
]

instance SensorDataAggregation : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated and preprocessed time-series sensor data traces from all physical sensors for visualization and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:fromData SensorDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationEnabler, SimulationIntegrationEnabler
]

instance RawSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Unprocessed time-series data including input current, output angle, torque, and angular velocity from all sensors."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted, GearboxPositionDataTransmitted, MotorCurrentDataTransmitted, TorqueDataTransmitted, AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataPreprocessingEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLModelingFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML-based modeling framework supporting multi-layered system engineering across requirements, functional, logical, and product layers."
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalShadowDataCollectionService, ModelIntegrationService
]

instance MathWorksSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation and analysis tool for detailed behavioral modeling including state machines and dynamic simulations."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationSupportService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message Queuing Telemetry Transport protocol for real-time, event-triggered sensor data transmission from physical system to Digital Shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalShadowDataCollectionService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized Asset Administration Shell providing semantic interoperability and contextual data aggregation for Digital Shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService
]

instance MontiArcAutomaton : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Architecture description language for component-connector models defining interfaces, interconnections, and composition."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelIntegrationService
]

instance DataVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization framework for presenting aggregated sensor data to heterogeneous stakeholders."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance DataPreprocessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software components for data aggregation and abstraction of raw sensor traces for specific stakeholder purposes."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataAbstractionService
]

instance SimulationIntegrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Integration layer connecting simulation tools with modeling frameworks for behavioral validation of sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationSupportService
]

// C6: Services
instance DigitalShadowDataCollectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated one-way data collection service aggregating contextual data traces from MQTT sensor streams for manufacturing applications."
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataAggregationInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Presentation service providing dashboards for stakeholder integration with aggregated sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance SimulationSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Compatibility service enabling integration with modeling tools (SysML, Simulink) for behavioral analysis without real-time control."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationAnalysisInsight
]

instance DataAbstractionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing abstraction of raw sensor data for specific purposes such as improving robot control accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataAbstractionInsight
]

instance ModelIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling integration of heterogeneous computational models across multiple abstraction layers using ADLs."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelIntegrationInsight
]

instance DataIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing semantic interoperability and contextual data aggregation through Asset Administration Shell."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIntegrationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance SensorDataAggregationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Aggregated time-series sensor data traces from all physical components for manufacturing process monitoring."
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of aggregated sensor data in dashboards for stakeholder analysis and decision support."
]

instance SimulationAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Behavioral analysis results from simulation tools (Simulink) for friction modeling and dynamic performance validation."
]

instance DataAbstractionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Processed and abstracted sensor data tailored for specific stakeholder needs such as robot control accuracy improvement."
]

instance ModelIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integrated multi-layered system models enabling cross-abstraction analysis from requirements to physical implementation."
]

instance DataIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Semantically integrated sensor data with contextual metadata enabling interoperability across system components."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **Digital Twin (DT) constellation** in this context is implicitly defined through **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)** and **architecture description languages (ADLs)**. The system employs **component & connector-based architectures** (e.g., ACME, AADL, MontiArc, SysML IBDs) to orchestrate interactions between **physical and digital components**, enabling **modular integration** of heterogeneous tools (e.g., Simulink, C++, Java). **Coordination mechanisms** are supported via **behavioral modeling** (e.g., state machines in SysML v1.7, MontiArc Automaton) and **simulation tools**, ensuring **real-time or near-real-time synchronization** of system states. The document does not specify explicit **orchestration patterns** (e.g., microservices, event-driven) but implies **resource management** through **multi-level abstraction** (requirements to product layers) and **stakeholder integration** via MBSE methodologies. No explicit mention of **resource allocation** or **system-wide coordination protocols** (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) is provided."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system’s fidelity is implicitly tied to the **comparison of simulated data (from MBSE models) with measured data (from physical sensors)** to validate model accuracy. However, the document does not specify **quantitative fidelity requirements**, **uncertainty sources**, or **error detection/correction mechanisms**. Validation and verification methods are not explicitly detailed beyond the **passive aggregation** of sensor data in the Digital Shadow and the **active processing** role of the Digital Twin. No **quality assurance processes** (e.g., cross-validation between simulation tools or formal verification) are mentioned for the system."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The **technical network infrastructure** for the Digital Shadow system includes the use of the **MQTT protocol** for streaming sensor data from physical objects to their digital counterparts. No further details are provided regarding **network topology/architecture**, **bandwidth/latency requirements**, **reliability/redundancy mechanisms**, or **security protocols**. The system’s reliance on MQTT suggests a lightweight, event-driven communication model, but no explicit specifications for network segmentation, failover mechanisms, or encryption methods (e.g., TLS) are mentioned."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The document highlights **horizontal integration** through **interoperability standards** and **data exchange protocols** implicit in **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)** and **architecture description languages (ADLs)**. Key technologies include:
  - **SysML (Systems Modeling Language)** for **cross-domain integration** (e.g., requirements, functional, logical, and physical layers).
  - **ADLs (e.g., ACME, AADL, MontiArc)** for **component-based interoperability**, enabling **interface standardization** and **connector-based communication**.
  - **Simulation tools (e.g., MathWorks Simulink, state machines in SysML v1.7)** for **behavioral synchronization** with external systems.
  - **General-purpose languages (C++, Java)** for **code-level integration** with enterprise or third-party systems.
  The document does not specify **exact protocols** (e.g., OPC UA, REST, MQTT) or **dependencies on external systems**, but the use of **heterogeneous tools** suggests **adapter-based integration patterns**. No mention of **Digital Twin-to-Digital Twin (DT-to-DT) integration** or **enterprise system interoperability frameworks** (e.g., Industry 4.0 standards) is provided."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system in Document [42] employs a **Digital Shadow** architecture integrated across multiple levels of the **Automation Pyramid**, where safety constraints are implicitly enforced through **formal model-driven engineering** (as described in Document [43]). The system leverages **data traceability** mechanisms to ensure auditability of operations, though explicit cybersecurity protocols (e.g., encryption, authentication) are not detailed. Document [45] references **friction modeling** for robot dynamics, which may indirectly support safety by refining motion control precision, but no explicit safety-critical standards (e.g., ISO 10218, IEC 61508) are cited. Document [42] mentions a **safety cell** restricting physical range, while data is streamed via **MQTT** (Document [52]), a lightweight protocol lacking inherent security guarantees unless augmented externally. No access control, threat mitigation, or fail-safe mechanisms are specified."
]
